This GitHub Action runs Bandit, a Python security linter, and integrates with reviewdog for inline PR comments. It supports configurable Bandit options (config file, flags, verbose mode) and reviewdog settings (tool name, report level, reporter). It also handles version management with action-bumpr and action-update-semver.
